title: HD Skins
description: Custom skin servers with higher resolution
body:
HD Skins is a mod that allows players to use alternative skin servers in minecraft, primary with the purpose of loading skins that are higher resolution than what Mojang normally allows.

\
Skins can be previewed and changed in-game using a handy customisation screen that even supports Mojang's own skin server!

\
Got any questions? Come join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HbJSFyu)!

\
This is also a companion mod which integrates well with [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-little-pony).
